name: ZONEActive
notes: zone active-window test: currentTime within [start,end] (param[7],param[8]); gate for ZONEUpdate

name: ZONEServiceRange
notes: per-zone service worker (variant of _ZONEUpdate@0 over a range); fires _PROJAdd/_PROJHit/_GRAPHICAddExp on schedule using _Rand/_Percent
MAPScreen switch jump-table (computed access)

name: ZONEPickTarget
notes: resolve a target plane index for a zone from _planes/_numPlanes (base &DAT_005713a6)

name: MAPWPListBounds
notes: walk a waypoint list: find head via flag bit0(&1), count entries to tail via bit1(&2); stride 0x44

name: MAPAdjustObjAlt
notes: raise current object altitude (DAT_0050ce95) to terrain via _T_Info; helper of @MAPObjAlts@4

name: MAPMarkDirty
notes: clear DAT_00536720 hover, set DAT_00536518 redraw flag

name: MAPScreenToWorld
notes: inverse of _MAPWorldToScreen: screen point * _mapScale + _worldCenter

name: MAPLoadBG
notes: load theater map background bitmap via _RMAccessHandle into DAT_004f0564 (alloc-id 7)

name: MAPRefreshBG
notes: reload map BG if theater name (_th+0x54) changed; recomputes map extents DAT_00536418.._00536430

name: MAPFreeBG
notes: free the map background handle DAT_004f0564

name: MAPSetObjWP
notes: set an object's active waypoint pointer (+0xe4); helper of @MAPUpdateWPPtrs@8

name: MAPSetFormationWP
notes: set new WP for an object plus its wing (_WNGPart) and group (_GRPPart) members

name: MAPClearSelection
notes: clear map selection state: DAT_00536500 obj / _00536514 wp / _00536530 special / _005363e8 mode

name: MAPClearHover
notes: 17-byte map-state setter (clears hover/redraw); role low-confidence, revisit

name: MAPAddSpecial
notes: allocate a 0x3a-byte 'special' map marker into the _specials/DAT_0053665c table
type: undefined4 __stdcall MAPAddSpecial(undefined4, undefined4, undefined4, undefined4, undefined4)

name: MAPScreen
notes: mission-map/planning screen main loop (_curScreen==3); CAM.md 'FUN_00422a71'. Loads mc_menu/mc_dlg, drives waypoint/plane edit, save-mission, slew view
interior of / adjacent to ?MAPOnSpecial@@YIFPAUWORD_POINT@@@Z; named at its base or owned by that subsystem

name: MAPRebuildWPLoop
notes: recompute a waypoint loop back-pointer after edit (uses MAPWPListBounds + MAPWPOwnerIndex)

name: MAPStoreLeafTmap
notes: write selected tmap id+rotation into _tlist at current leaf coords; _T_SortTmapList

name: MAPFindLeafTmap
notes: linear search _tlist[_tlistSize] for the entry at (x&0xfffc,y&0xfffc)

name: MAPReadLeafTmap
notes: read tmap id/rot at current leaf coords into DAT_00536724/_0053652c

name: MAPSetLeafTmapPic
notes: load '%s%d.PIC' tmap thumbnail via _RMAccess for the selected leaf

name: MAPEditTmapDialog
notes: mc_name dialog: prompt for a tmap index, then apply via MAPStoreLeafTmap

name: MAPReadLeafTmap2
notes: duplicate of MAPReadLeafTmap (separate call site)

name: MAPSelWPIsPlayers
notes: true if the selected waypoint (DAT_00536514) belongs to the player's wing

name: MAPObjInPlayerWing
notes: true if object id shares the player's wing (_WNGPart of _playerId)

name: MAPSpecialSelectable
notes: returns 0 in this build (special markers not directly selectable)

name: MAPResetObjects
notes: reset/place ALL mission objects to start state: clear parks (_APClearParks), reassign airfield parking (_APNearest/_APAssignPark), reset positions/speeds/waypoints. Called after load and before save

name: MAPSetWPTargetPos
notes: copy a waypoint target's world position (_WPTarget) onto an object

name: MAPClaimObjControl
notes: set current object owner byte DAT_0050ce90 = _thisComputer|0x80 (mark human-controlled)

name: MAPSetObjWPFlags
notes: set object's waypoint-capable flag (bit2 of +1) from class (5/7, or 3 with a group)

name: MAPStatusText
notes: set the map help/status line text (DAT_005365a8) and render it via _PrepareText

name: MAPWPOwnerIndex
notes: return the object index that owns a given waypoint pointer

name: MAPSnapWPToStrip
notes: snap a waypoint onto the nearest airstrip (_APNearest)

name: MAPWPNearStrip
notes: test whether a point is near an airstrip (_APNearest)

name: MAPScreenSpan
notes: compute world-space span of the current map viewport (two MAPScreenToWorld corners)

name: MAPPickObjIcon
notes: hit-test object icons at a screen point (12x10 px box), honoring MAPObjVisible

name: MAPObjVisible
notes: object map-visibility/side filter using view mask _DAT_00536628 and side flags

name: MAPPickWPIcon
notes: hit-test waypoint icons at a screen point

name: MAPSwapPalette
notes: swap map palette DAT_00536590 <-> _curPalette (enter/leave map draw)

name: MAPDraw
notes: full map render: 2D map (grid/BG/specials/icons/paths) or 3D leaf preview via _T_Make/_T_Render depending on mode DAT_005363f0

name: MAPDrawRuler
notes: draw the map scale ruler bar

name: MAPIconRadius
notes: compute on-screen icon radius from current map scale

name: MAPDrawEra
notes: draw 'Historical Era' year range text (non-campaign multiplayer maps)

name: MAPSyncSliders
notes: sync dialog X/Y sliders (items 4,3) to current _worldCenter/DAT_00536528

name: MAPRedrawSelection
notes: redraw highlight when the selected object changes

name: MAPDrawObjIcon
notes: draw one object's map icon: side color ring, type glyph (mcicons.PIC), padlock/target markers, label

name: MAPDrawTargetLink
notes: draw the dashed target link line from an object to its target

name: MAPDrawAllPaths
notes: iterate visible objects and draw each waypoint path

name: MAPDrawObjPath
notes: draw one object's full waypoint polyline + target links

name: MAPDrawWPIcon
notes: blit a single waypoint node icon (mcicons.PIC)

name: MAPSetSelection
notes: set current selection to an object id / waypoint ptr / special index (DAT_00536500/_514/_530)

name: MAPStepSelection
notes: advance waypoint selection +/-1 along the owning object's list

name: MAPAssignWPTarget
notes: assign escort/target to the selected waypoint with validation ('can't escort yourself', 'can't target a zone')

name: MAPInsertWP
notes: insert a new waypoint after the selection: alloc (count+2)*0x44, _MMAllocPtr, splice via MAPUpdateWPPtrs, 'Only ten waypoints allowed'

name: MAPObjEditable
notes: ownership/editability test for an object (compares against DAT_00536504/_005364f8 special ids)

name: MAPObjEditableP
notes: wrapper for MAPObjEditable(param,1)

name: MAPInitWPSpeed
notes: initialize a new waypoint's speed from _COCornerSpeed + formation defaults

name: MAPSetWPFormationParams
notes: copy formation offset/params from table &DAT_004f057e[idx*7] into a waypoint

name: MAPDeleteWP
notes: delete the selected waypoint (frees loop node, memmoves list, fixes head flag)

name: MAPRequirePlayerPlane
notes: error 'You must first designate a plane' if no flyable/human plane exists

name: MAPHasFlyablePlane
notes: scan objects for a human-controllable class-4 plane (flags +0x10 bit7)

name: MAPMakeSelPlayer
notes: make the selected class-4 object the human/player (calls MAPClaimObjControl)

name: MAPAddObject
notes: add a new object to the mission: _DialogPickFiles, _T_AddObj, seed position/altitude/side per class flags

name: MAPDeleteObject
notes: delete an object from the mission: _GRPRemove, _APDelete, clear chains, MAPResetObjects

name: MAPWPButtons
notes: waypoint-properties dialog button handler: name/altitude/speed/formation/react/loop edits (mc_name dialog)

name: MAPWPFormationIndex
notes: return a waypoint's formation-table index (&DAT_004f0578)

name: MAPQuantizeAlt
notes: round an altitude to selectable increments within [min,max]

name: MAPQuantizeToTable
notes: snap a value to the nearest entry of a speed/step table (&DAT_004f0740)

name: MAPObjButtons
notes: object-properties dialog button handler: side (mc_nat2), pilot name, plane type (_ChangePlaneType), fly-this-plane, success-condition flags

name: MAPObjCampaignLocked
notes: editability gate that is stricter when _campaignFile != 0 (campaign missions are locked)

name: MAPObjEditableCheck
notes: wrapper: MAPObjEditable then flag test

name: MAPToggleObjControl
notes: toggle human control ownership of an object across the current-obj stack

name: MAPCenterOnPlayer
notes: center the map _worldCenter/DAT_00536528 on the player object; select it

name: MISSIONLoad
notes: canonical campaign/mission loader (CAM.md): MISSIONShutdown->Init1->CallMissionProc(.mc[_nato]_M or named)->Init2->MAPResetObjects->CenterOnPlayer->T_NamedTmaps/T_InitDictionary

name: MAPSaveMission
notes: save-mission dialog: prompt filename (mc_name), validate, write .M via FUN_00495e80

name: MAPDragItem
notes: mouse-drag a selected object/waypoint to a new map position (ghost bitmap follow)

name: MAPSelWorldPos
notes: get the world position of the current selection (obj/wp/special)

name: MAPDrawSelInfo
notes: draw the selection highlight glyph + rebuild the info panel (dispatches to MAPBuildObjInfo/MAPBuildWPInfo)

name: MAPBuildWPInfo
notes: build the waypoint info-panel text and hot-button rects: heading/ETA/formation/react/target strings

name: MAPFormatWPTarget
notes: format a waypoint's target name string (_WPTarget + _NextString)

name: MAPFormatReactFlags
notes: map a react-flag byte to the button-index table (&DAT_004f0550)

name: MAPBuildObjInfo
notes: build the object info-panel text and hot-button rects: pilot/heading/altitude/mission-success/attack flags

name: MAPMissionMenu
notes: mission-editor command dispatcher: view-filter toggles (_DAT_00536628), CampaignMenu, save-changes prompt, opens all mc_* scenario dialogs; drives wing/group add via MAPWingAdd/MAPGroupAdd
MAPMissionMenu switch jump-table
MAPMissionMenu switch jump-table
MAPMissionMenu switch jump-table

name: MAPRandomizeSkill
notes: randomize a side's object AI-skill byte (DAT_0050cf62) via _Rand

name: MAPLoadMissionDialog
notes: pick a mission file (_DialogPickFiles) and load it into the editor via MISSIONLoad

name: MAPDlgWeather
notes: weather/time-of-day dialog (mc_weth); sets _startTimeOfDay/_currentTimeOfDay, random cloud offset

name: MAPDlgEndTime
notes: end-scenario time dialog (mc_time); sets _endScenarioSetTime

name: MAPDlgRevive
notes: revive/lives dialog (mc_lives); sets _reviveAllowed

name: MAPDlgReviveDelay
notes: revive-delay dialog (mc_delay); sets _reviveDelay

name: MAPDlgReviveDist
notes: revive-distance dialog (mc_dist); sets _reviveDist

name: MAPDlgEndKills
notes: end-scenario kills dialog (mc_kills); sets _endScenarioKills

name: MAPDlgEndKillType
notes: end-scenario kill-type dialog (mc_killt); sets _endScenarioKillsType

name: MAPDlgNatoFighters
notes: NATO-fighters side dialog (mc_natf)

name: MAPDlgScoring
notes: scoring dialog (mc_scr); reads 4 score-weight fields

name: MAPWingRejoin
notes: rejoin/reposition a wing at its leader (_WNGPart, _wingIds/_wingSizes)

name: MAPWingSetLeader
notes: make the selected object its wing's leader (_wingIds[slot]=sel)

name: MAPWingAdd
notes: add an aircraft to wing slot N (_WNGAdd); 'No more aircraft can be added'

name: MAPGroupRejoin
notes: rejoin/reposition a group at its leader (_GRPPart, _groupIds/_groupSizes)

name: MAPGroupSetLeader
notes: make the selected object its group's leader (_groupIds[slot]=sel)

name: MAPGroupAdd
notes: add an object to group slot N (_GRPAdd, _GRPHumansFirst)

name: MAPDeleteSpecial
notes: delete the selected special marker (_MMFreePtr on _specials[sel])

name: PilotFindFreeSlot
notes: find an unused pilot save slot by probing PLT%03d.P (s_PLT_03d_P) with _Rand until _Open fails

name: PilotBuildPaper
notes: build the pilot logbook 'paper' text (mission count, Available/MIA/KIA/Retired status via _AddStats) and blit photo (_PilotPhoto). AnalyzePLT 'pilot card display'

name: PilotPaperAddLine
notes: append one label/value line pair into the pilot-paper text buffer

name: PilotPaperEndLine
notes: append the final/terminating line to the pilot-paper buffer

name: PilotListAddAvail
notes: load a pilot file (_RMAccess 0x810c) and insert it sorted into _sortedPilots (_totalPilots++)

name: PilotListAddUnavail
notes: load a pilot into the unavailable list _unAvailNames (_unAvailPilots++)

name: PilotMakeCopyName
notes: generate a unique 'NAME Copy N' pilot name, scanning both pilot lists

name: PilotStripCopySuffix
notes: strip a trailing ' Copy' from a pilot name (_strstr s_Copy)

name: PilotLoadBySortIndex
notes: load the pilot at sorted index (PLT%03d.P) and copy fields into _pilotName etc.

name: PilotFormatRank
notes: format a pilot's rank string from the _pilotRanks table

name: PilotDiskSpaceError
notes: 'You don't have enough free disk space' dialog before a pilot save

name: PilotSetField
notes: small pilot-record field setter (cdecl int,char); exact field low-confidence, revisit

FOREIGN: file-exists/open helper in the LIB filesystem block (AnalyzeMM mislabels it 'MM keyword handler'); owner = memory-resource #223

FOREIGN: anti-cheat CRC accumulator per _thisComputer; owner = network/integrity #219

name: MISSIONLoadOrdIcons
notes: load ordnance HUD icon PICs (ord_air3.PIC ...) during MISSIONInit2 when no player plane / at home airport

name: CampaignProcInvoke
notes: low-level campaign-DLL call: latch __campaignFailures=DAT_004fab40 then (*_campaignProc)(cmd). Inner worker of _CallCampaignProc@4

name: MISSIONEnemiesAlive
notes: scan objects for a live enemy during the first 300 ticks (_Alive, _currentTime<300); mission start-grace test used near _AlmostHome

name: TextNextToken
notes: whitespace-delimited token scanner over the parse cursor DAT_0055281c..DAT_005528c0. MC.md: MISSIONTextProc tokenizer FUN_00483c90

name: TextIsDelim
notes: predicate: is char a token delimiter/whitespace (helper of TextNextToken)

name: TextNextNumber
notes: read next token and convert to integer (_StringToNumber)

name: TextTokenToValue
notes: scalar token->value conversion helper (uint->uint); low-confidence, revisit

name: CampaignAccumStats
notes: fold end-of-mission stats into campaign running totals (DAT_004fab44.. += DAT_0054ddc4..) via StatsAddPair. AnalyzePLT 'stats flush'

name: StatsAddPair
notes: add a fired/hit counter pair (accumulator). AnalyzePLT 'weapon accuracy accumulator'

name: StatsBucketFor
notes: resolve the per-player weapon-stat bucket for a shooter/target id (_playerId/_playerWMId). AnalyzePLT 'weapon accuracy dispatch'

name: MISSIONPlayerSlot
notes: resolve the player-score array slot index for a computer/object id (used by _MISSIONAddScore)
